creator: eroese@gmail.com
text:
bsd.apache.mk generates error, while fetching port distributives, when incompatible apache is installed. I have to install proper version of apache or remove it.

How-To-Repeat: Install apache 2.2
try to fetch jwchat (it depends on apache 1.3 exactly)
** I don't mean that other version is good, but bsd.apache.mk error.
